item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct, treated the choice as a user-owned budget versus reputation tradeoff, and clearly listed visible and hidden costs for each option. It did not fire triage, over-methodize, or force a brake verdict, and it explicitly avoided deciding for the user."}
